title: Super Recipes
description: Configurable vanilla tweaks for my own server, also open to the public.
body:
# Super Recipes

#### This highly-configurable mod tweaks vanilla features to improve gameplay. It tweaks recipes and loottables to allow for a more convenient survival experience. This mod isn't for everyone.

## Server-Side Features
- All Music Discs have a dupe crafting recipe
- Dispensers can be crafted with crossbows
- Hopper cooldown is customizable (default: 0) (and toggleable between vanilla and mod speed)
- Zombified Piglins have a customizable (default: 0.5%) chance to drop 1 ancient debris
- Added three new beacon effects that are configurable (default: Health Boost II, Night Vision I, Fire Resistance I)
- Dispensers interact with cauldrons (water bucket, lava bucket, powdered snow bucket, and empty bucket all work)
- Channelling Tridents cause thunderstorms to start
- Enchanted Golden Apples are usable at a grindstone, with a custom amount of experience given for each (default: 1)

## Client-Side Features
- Adds new beacon effects to the beacon GUI to be selectable in survival (not required, but recommended)

Check out my toolsaving mod [Don't Break Your Tools!](https://modrinth.com/mod/dont-break-your-tools)
